listening.title: Listening: Job interview questions
listening.transcript: I start work at eight o'clock. I work in a small office downtown. I like my job because I meet many people every day.

listening.title: Listening: A disagreement
listening.transcript: I disagree. I think the answer is wrong. He never eats fast food, and he rarely watches TV. He doesn't like noisy places at all.

questions.question: Does he like noisy places?
questions.explanation: "He doesn't like noisy places at all."
